config.enabled.name: Enabled
config.enabled.desc: Whether to enable auto fairy dust application.
config.max-per-second.name: Max Uses Per Second
config.max-per-second.desc: Maximum number of fairy dust applications per second to prevent lag.
config.machine-cooldown.name: Machine Cooldown (seconds)
config.machine-cooldown.desc: Minimum seconds between fairy dust uses on the same machine.
config.toggle-overlay-key.name: Toggle Overlay Key
config.toggle-overlay-key.desc: Key to toggle the network connectivity overlay.
config.show-hud-message.name: Show HUD Messages
config.show-hud-message.desc: Show a HUD message when fairy dust is consumed.
config.connectors.title: Connectors
config.connector.desc: If enabled, this item links machines and chests together.
config.custom-connectors.name: Custom Connectors
config.custom-connectors.desc: Additional connector items (comma-separated item IDs or names).
